snippet.title: 功夫女足｜Kung Fu Soccer | Official Trailer | 正式预告片    ｜Coming to GSC starting 13 August 2026
snippet.description:
《#功夫女足》首支正式预告，火热来袭！周星驰，回来了！🔥⚽

神级功夫 × 足球热血 × 爆笑无厘头，这一次踢出全新的传奇！⚽ 热血一脚，征服全世界！

由张小斐、迪丽热巴、张艺兴领衔主演，刘嘉玲、佐藤健特别出演。

准备好迎接今年最疯狂、最热血、最好笑的足球盛宴了吗？

🎬《功夫女足》🇲🇾8月13日 全马GSC戏院热血上映！

⚽🔥 The wait is over… Stephen Chow returns with #KUNGFUSOCCER!

The official trailer is finally here! Watch it now! 

🥋 Legendary kung fu. ⚽ Adrenaline-fuelled football. 😂 Stephen Chow’s signature comedy.

Explosive action. Out-of-this-world skills. Non-stop laughs. One unforgettable underdog adventure.

⚽ One Passionate Kick. Conquer the World.

Starring Zhang Xiaofei, Dilraba Dilmurat, and Lay Zhang, with special appearances by Carina Lau and Takeru Satoh.

Get ready for the year’s wildest, most action-packed, laugh-out-loud football spectacle!

🎬 KUNG FU SOCCER
🇲🇾 In GSC starting 13.08.2026! 

#StephenChow #周星驰 #EncoreFilms

snippet.title: Dune: Part Three | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
“Forgive me for all I’ve done” Experience the epic conclusion. Dune: Part Three only in theaters and IMAX December 18. #DuneMovie#FilmedforIMAX

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes Dune: Part Three, bringing Academy Award-nominated filmmaker Denis Villeneuve’s epic trilogy to a breathtaking conclusion.

Dune: Part Three is set nearly two decades after Paul Atreides seized control of the Imperium. Now a ruthless Emperor, Paul must face the consequences of his reign as old allies return, terrifying new threats emerge, and betrayal lurks in every shadow. Haunted by visions of Imperial collapse and the reappearance of his long-lost love, Paul is drawn into a sweeping conspiracy, with Chani at the heart of its unfolding mystery. As rebellion brews and enemies close in, Paul must confront the true cost of power and the fate of those he loves the most.

The film stars Oscar nominee Timothée Chalamet, Zendaya, Jason Momoa, Oscar nominee Florence Pugh, Rebecca Ferguson, Isaach de Bankolé, with Oscar nominee Charlotte Rampling, with Anya Taylor-Joy, and Robert Pattinson, and Oscar winner Javier Bardem.

Villeneuve directs from a screenplay by Villeneuve and Brian K. Vaughan, based on the novels written by Frank Herbert. The film is produced by Oscar nominees Mary Parent, Cale Boyter, Villeneuve and Tanya Lapointe, and Joe Caracciolo, and executive produced by Joshua Grode, Thomas Tull, Herbert W. Gains, Brian Herbert, Byron Merritt, Kim Herbert, Kevin J. Anderson, Richard P. Rubinstein, John Harrison and Jessica Derhammer.

Joining Villeneuve behind the camera are Oscar-winning director of photography Linus Sandgren, Oscar-winning production designer Patrice Vermette, Oscar-winning editor Joe Walker, Oscar nominated costume designer Jacqueline West, Oscar-nominated casting director Francine Maisler, and Oscar-winning composer Hans Zimmer.

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present A Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Denis Villeneuve, Dune: Part Three, only in theaters and IMAX® across North America on December 18, 2026 and internationally beginning 16 December 2026. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures and in China by Legendary East.

snippet.title: DIOR大穎 - 她已不再是那個女孩 - (荒唐random MV)
snippet.description:
上天會用更好的安排
帶你穿過黑夜 走過陰霾 ✨


《她已不再是那個女孩》

作詞：DIOR 大穎
作曲：DIOR 大穎
演唱：DIOR 大穎

親愛的你啊
經歷過無數和自己的對話
明知道會受傷 還逞強 不害怕

我最愛的你啊
你落落大方的 接受變化
你走出世俗的框架
你不是 傻瓜

你帶著滿身泥沙
一個人離開了家
放下了多少牽掛
漸漸明白 這就是長大

她已不再是那個女孩
她不再用雙手抓緊未來
輕輕放開 把一切歸還給人海
風起雨落 命運重新安排

她已不再是那個女孩
用真心交換 未知的未來
流過淚的眼 還是充滿期待
即便一路跌倒 滿身塵埃
放心 會好起來

當我回頭望 我走過好漫長的路
好多人陪著我 讓我覺得我好幸福

我帶著滿身泥沙
一個人離開了家
我偶爾還是會害怕
但我堅信前路 會開滿鮮花

她已不再是那個女孩
她不再用雙手抓緊未來
輕輕放開 把一切歸還給人海
風起雨落 命運重新安排

我已不再是那個女孩
用真心交換 未知的未來
流過淚的眼 洗淨塵埃
雨過天晴之後
相信 會好起來

那一夜那個女孩 她再也不會回來
那一天那個女孩 她留在茫茫人海
那一年那個女孩 學會釋懷生命所有離開
她相信一切會有 更好的安排

她已不再是那個女孩
不再用雙手抓緊未來
輕輕放開 把一切歸還給人海
經歷風雨過後 我才明白

上天會用更好的安排
帶你穿過黑夜 走過陰霾
雖然現在 我已不再是那個女孩
但我依舊 勇敢去愛
那個女孩她 還相信愛

snippet.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY (2026) TRAILER | Tom Holland | Marvel Comics | Concept
snippet.description:
#SpiderManBrandNewDay #SpiderMan #Brandnewday #Marvel #Comics

🎥 Attention viewers! (ITS FAN MADE)
This Spider-Man: Brand New Day breakdown dives into every detail from the final trailer and the latest Spider-Man 2026 trailer footage fans have been dissecting frame by frame. Tom Holland's Peter Parker faces his biggest test yet alongside Zendaya, with Sadie Sink stepping into the Marvel Studios universe in a role many are calling the true successor to the emotional weight of No Way Home. This video unpacks every scene from the new Spider-Man movie, exploring how Brand New Day connects to Peter's journey and what it means for his future in the MCU. Whether you're searching for 4K trailer breakdowns, the newest Spider-Man trailer drops, or just want the full comics-accurate analysis, this is your complete guide to Marvel's most anticipated release of 2026.

The inspiration behind this video:
Spider-Man: Brand New Day Final Trailer has officially arrived and Tom Holland is swinging into the most emotional and action-packed chapter of his entire MCU journey right now! Marvel Studios delivers the ultimate Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer in stunning 4K as Peter Parker faces a world that no longer knows his name after the devastating events of Spider-Man: No Way Home. Zendaya returns in a role that will break every fan's heart all over again, and with Sadie Sink joining the Spider-Man Marvel Studios universe in a mystery role straight out of the comics, this new Spider-Man movie is already the most anticipated Marvel release of the entire trailer 2026 era. From the Spider-Man New Home Trailer emotional callbacks to the explosive new threats teased in this Spider-Man 2026 Trailer — Peter Parker has never felt more alone or more powerful at the same time!

This Spider-Man Brand New Day Final Trailer breakdown goes deep into every hidden Easter egg, comics connection, and jaw-dropping scene that the Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer is hiding in plain sight for true Marvel fans. The Spider-Man New Home era is officially over and this upcoming new chapter confirmed by every trailer 2025 and trailer 2026 tease proves that Spider-Man Marvel Studios is swinging in a bold and completely fresh direction that will redefine everything we thought we knew about Tom Holland's Peter Parker. Zendaya and Sadie Sink together in the same Marvel movie is already the casting combination of the decade, and this 4K concept trailer makes it crystal clear that Spider-Man Brand New Day is built to be the biggest Marvel Studios event of 2026!

If you love content from Rotten Tomatoes TV, Teaser PRO, FilmSpot Trailer, MovieGasm, KinoCheck, EmergencyAwesome, IGN TV Trailer, and TV Promos — this is your ultimate destination for everything Spider-Man Brand New Day and all things Marvel! Subscribe and hit the notification bell so you never miss a single Spider-Man trailer, Marvel Studios announcement, or 4K concept trailer breakdown as we count down to the biggest upcoming Marvel release of the year. Drop your thoughts in the comments below — is the Spider-Man Brand New Day Final Trailer everything you dreamed of, and are Tom Holland, Zendaya, and Sadie Sink about to deliver the greatest Spider-Man movie ever made?

snippet.description:

And it's something horrifying.

Verity's voice actor: ‪@JustWhispy  
Special thanks to @GroxMC for accepting to be in the vid!

Watch my videos on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/033vHZW7F2GVDiC44bHwfj

Shoutout to:
@itsfilsfr - Verity helpline voice actor
@peaktownmc - made the laboratory machine model
@9meoww - helped me with animations

This is part 3 of the Minecraft Verity Series:
I built a way out, and it let me believe it. Every wire led to an escape. Every calculation said it would work. And the second it mattered, I found out it only ever worked one way.

NO, you CANNOT publish mods, sell merch, or do anything commercial about Verity before asking me first.

With the help of his friends, he embarks on a global quest to find it before it falls into the wrong hands and threatens to upend the peace they sacrificed everything to achieve.

snippet.description:
Returning to zero is not an option.

GODZILLA MINUS ZERO
VFX, Written, and Directed by Takashi Yamazaki

In theatres November 6
Follow @godzilla_toho and @GKIDSfilms for more updates!
godzillaminuszero.com

GODZILLA MINUS ZERO picks up in 1949, two years after the tumultuous events of Godzilla Minus One, and continues the story of the Shikishima family as they face an all-new calamity. 

As a project Filmed For IMAX, GODZILLA MINUS ZERO was shot with high-definition digital cameras certified by IMAX, and optimized in sound and imagery unique to IMAX screens. Fans can look forward to seeing Godzilla presented to all new terrifying heights, making GODZILLA MINUS ZERO a true cinematic event not to be missed.

snippet.title: DUET BIKIN PATAH HATI 🥀 Mahligaimu Dari Airmataku - Lestari | Cover Duet Syariva ft Bang Brokey
snippet.description:
Siapa di sini yang udah setia, tapi ternyata dia diam-diam berpunya dan membangun kebahagiaan di atas air matamu? Kumpul dan luapkan rasa sesak kalian di sini... 🥀💔

"Kau bina mahligai dari air mata... yang jatuh berderai di wajah sepiku... Hancurnya hatiku bisa tak terkata, terhumbang rasa diriku..."

Berusaha memejamkan mata di tengah malam yang sepi, namun bayangannya tak kunjung sudi pergi dari ingatan. Teramat sulit melupakan seseorang yang dulunya meminta kita untuk setia, namun pada akhirnya dia sendirilah yang berubah dan berpaling arah. Ketika janji manis dan saat-saat romantis ternyata hanya setakat di bibir saja, batin ini terasa dibelasah rindu yang tiada berujung. Hanya doa tulus yang bisa terucap, mengikhlaskan dia bahagia bersama insan lain, meski harus merelakan dirinya membangun mahligai kebahagiaan dari derai air mata kita sendiri.

Membawa kembali salah satu mahakarya Slow Rock Melayu paling menyayat hati dari band legendaris Lestari, Syariva berkolaborasi dengan Bang Brokey mempersembahkan cover emosional bertajuk "Mahligaimu Dari Airmataku". Dibalut dengan harmoni vokal duet nada tinggi yang dramatis serta petikan melodi gitar yang pilu, mari kita resapi perihnya sebuah pengkhianatan cinta.

Resapi setiap bait liriknya, hayati alunan melodinya, dan bagikan lagu ini kepada dia yang telah menorehkan luka terdalam di hatimu.

📌 Apresiasi Karya Asli (Respect the Musician):
Versi cover ini tidak akan pernah ada tanpa adanya mahakarya luar biasa dari versi aslinya. Kami sadar betul, keindahan dan kualitas vokal dalam cover kami ini tidak akan pernah bisa menandingi, apalagi seindah dan sebagus versi asli yang dibawakan oleh penyanyi aslinya. Oleh karena itu, kami sangat menyarankan dan mengajak teman-teman semua untuk tetap menonton, mendengarkan, dan memberikan dukungan penuh pada versi original dari lagu ini di berbagai platform streaming musik resmi yang tersedia. Mari kita selalu menghargai karya murni dari para musisi maestro kita. Selamat mendengarkan! ❤️🎵

Run from the sunlight, Dracula
Run from the sunlight, Dracula

[Verse 3: JENNIE & Tame Impala]
Hey, Kevin, what's up? (Haha)
Come pull up in my spot
Let's keep the night glowing

I'll never leave this floor, got me needin' more (Oh)

Sinking in my teeth, I buy time

[Bridge: Tame Impala & JENNIE]
But please, do you think about what it might mean? (Mean)
'Cause I dream about you in my sleep
